scenarios.description: visitor is null triggers IllegalArgumentException at Validate.notNull(visitor)
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Node();

scenarios.description: root is null triggers IllegalArgumentException at Validate.notNull(root)
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = new NoOpVisitor(); Node root = null;

scenarios.description: single root node with no children calls head then tail once
scenarios.precondition: using a fake visitor recording calls
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor saw head(root,0) then tail(root,0) exactly once; traversal ends
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Node root = new Node();

scenarios.description: root with one child descends and ascends (depth change)
scenarios.precondition: using a fake visitor recording calls; tree: root->child
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor saw head(root,0), head(child,1), tail(child,1), tail(root,0)
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Element root = new Element(); root.appendChild(new Node());

scenarios.description: root with two children visits siblings correctly
scenarios.precondition: using a fake visitor; tree: root->childA,childB
scenarios.expectedResult: calls head(root,0), head(childA,1), tail(childA,1), head(childB,1), tail(childB,1), tail(root,0)
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Element root = new Element(); root.appendChild(new Node()); root.appendChild(new Node());

scenarios.description: visitor.head removes node triggers removal branch
scenarios.precondition: stub visitor removes node in head to simulate removal; tree: parent->child
scenarios.expectedResult: child removed, then traversal continues from parent with depth decremented
pseudocode: RemovingVisitor visitor = new RemovingVisitor(); Element parent = new Element(); Node child = new Node(); parent.appendChild(child);

scenarios.description: visitor.head replaces node triggers replacement branch
scenarios.precondition: stub visitor replaces node in head; tree: parent->child
scenarios.expectedResult: child replaced with new node at same index; visitor sees head on replacement
pseudocode: ReplacingVisitor visitor = new ReplacingVisitor(); Element parent = new Element(); Node child = new Node(); parent.appendChild(child);

scenarios.description: empty Elements list yields no traversal calls
scenarios.precondition: using RecordingVisitor; elements is empty list
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Elements elements = new Elements();

scenarios.description: Elements list with one element delegates to Node overload once
scenarios.precondition: RecordingVisitor records calls; elements contains single Element
scenarios.expectedResult: calls include head and tail for that element once
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Elements elements = new Elements(new Element());

scenarios.description: Elements list with multiple elements delegates traversal per element
scenarios.expectedResult: calls size equals sum of calls for each element traversal
pseudocode: RecordingVisitor visitor = new RecordingVisitor(); Elements elements = new Elements(new Element(), new Element());
